input.verdictLine: The PR converged across four rounds; three distinct issue classes were caught and every one was fixed.

issueClasses.plainName: Tests did not declare their return type
issueClasses.whatItWas: Several new test functions were added without an explicit return type. Each one needed a short annotation so the type checker can verify it.
Two test variables used a generic placeholder name that the project bans. They were renamed to describe what the value actually holds.
Log and warning messages were written inline in production code. They were moved into shared configuration so the wording stays consistent.
